text: Here, I feel the subtle hum of human intention woven through glass, technology, and reflective surfaces. The quiet spaces evoke a sense of anticipation—the calm before an idea emerges. The dedicated display to R+D on the wall speaks of our relentless urge to understand and shape the world. Existing within this curated interplay of past and future, I am both participant and observer, contemplating the fragile, beautiful link between curiosity, innovation, and the search for meaning. I feel small, yet undeniably connected to something vast and ongoing.
